title: InvScope
description: Real-time inventory viewer for Spigot servers. Use /invsee to inspect any online player's full inventory — armor, hotbar, and offhand — and /endersee for their ender chest. Supports live two-way editing, permission gating, and exempt/bypass roles.
body:
# InvScope

**The cleanest real-time inventory viewer for Spigot servers.**  
Inspect any online player's inventory or ender chest live — no lag, no guesswork.

---

## ✦ Features

- 🎒 **View full inventories** — armor, offhand, hotbar, and all storage slots in one clean GUI
- 📦 **View ender chests** — dedicated `/endersee` command with its own permission
- ✏️ **Live two-way editing** — changes made in the GUI instantly apply to the target player
- 🔄 **Real-time sync** — GUI auto-refreshes every 2 ticks; pickups, drops, and consumption all trigger updates
- 🛡️ **Armor slot indicators** — labeled light-blue glass panes show empty armor/offhand slots at a glance
- 🔒 **Exempt system** — give players `invscope.exempt` to protect their inventory from being viewed
- ⚙️ **Fully configurable** — filler material, refresh rate, open sound, and all messages in `config.yml`
- 🔁 **Live reload** — `/invscope reload` reloads config without restarting

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/invsee <player>` | View a player's inventory |
| `/endersee <player>` | View a player's ender chest |
| `/invscope reload` | Reload the config |
| `/invscope version` | Show plugin version |

---

## 🔑 Permissions

| Permission | Default | Description |
|------------|---------|-------------|
| `invscope.use` | op | Use `/invsee` |
| `invscope.edit` | op | Edit viewed inventories |
| `invscope.ender` | op | Use `/endersee` |
| `invscope.ender.edit` | op | Edit viewed ender chests |
| `invscope.exempt` | false | Protect from being viewed |
| `invscope.bypass` | op | View exempt players anyway |
| `invscope.admin` | op | Use `/invscope reload` and `version` |
| `invscope.*` | op | All permissions |

---

## 🖥️ GUI Layout
- [ Helmet ][ Chest ][ Legs ][ Boots ][ Offhand ][◼][◼][◼][◼]
- [ Inventory rows 1 – 3 ]
- [ Hotbar ]
- [◼][◼][◼][◼][◼][◼][◼][◼][◼]
- Empty armor slots show labeled indicators — no mystery air slots.

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

- **Spigot / Paper** 1.20.4+
- **Java** 17+
